global_description: A medium-sized songbird with a plump, elongated body. It features a bright yellow underbelly and throat, contrasted by a brown and white streaked back and wings. The bird has a distinctive black V-shaped band across its chest and a long, pointed bill.

part_details.underbelly: Bright yellow, smooth and vibrant, extending from the throat to the tail.
part_details.chest: Marked with a bold black V-shaped band, contrasting against the yellow.
part_details.back: Brown with white streaks, providing a camouflaged appearance.
part_details.wings: Brown with white streaks, matching the back pattern.
part_details.bill: Long, slender, and pointed, suitable for probing.

spatial_relations: The black V-shaped band is positioned across the yellow chest.
The long pointed bill extends from the front of the head.
The white outer tail feathers are visible when the tail is spread.
